## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete

-->
- Deprecated and removed pull_MODIS.jl in /experiments/integrated/fluxnet
- Added artifact for MODIS LAI data at 4 fluxnet sites
- Updated met_drivers_FLUXNET.jl to work with new artifact

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

title: using ClimaArtifact's modis_lai_fluxnet_sites to deprecate and remove…
